checks.detail: The cockpit and feedback page load /source-ui/source-ui.css before local application CSS.
The GUI uses tradeos.css-vars.v1 via the Source UI stylesheet and local compatibility aliases.
The GUI uses tradeos.theme, dark default, and Source UI React theme runtime.
Uses package-managed Fontsource assets bundled by Vite.
The header renders a Source Intelligence UX pulse strip and exposes platform pulse metadata on window.__SOURCE_PLATFORM_PULSE__.
Recommendation cards and /feedback keep feedback attached to packet targets while local keys, approvals, and execution state remain operator-controlled.
The hero, footer, manifest, and admin view state the self-hosted operator execution boundary.
Canonical provider-review screenshots are generated and committed for cockpit, admin, and feedback surfaces on desktop and mobile.
The Playwright suite runs axe WCAG 2 A/AA, WCAG 2.1 A/AA, and best-practice checks on cockpit, admin, and feedback surfaces.
The Symbol Cockpit Playwright suite checks document horizontal overflow on desktop and mobile.
The GUI uses bounded grids and wrapping standard badges; manual screenshot review is still required before marking this pass.
Admin & Ops renders a trial matrix that maps Source UI standards to TradeOS dashboard anchors and cockpit surfaces.
The React/Vite cockpit still consumes the same Source UI CSS, contracts, theme, and conformance artifacts.
The cockpit uses the Source UI React adapter for theme, proof, conformance, status-list, service-list, event-list, and trial-matrix primitives.
